anomalies.description: power_consumption is 5.32σ below the normal baseline (observed=0.4936, baseline_mean=2.2488).

Efficiency anomaly at t=65.0s: water_temp is stable (19.951°C ≈ setpoint) but power consumption is disproportionately high relative to control signal (health_metric=7.789, 3.11σ above baseline). Consistent with coolant/refrigerant leakage degrading cooling efficiency while PID compensates by increasing compressor demand.

Efficiency anomaly at t=76.0s: water_temp is stable (20.008°C ≈ setpoint) but power consumption is disproportionately high relative to control signal (health_metric=7.790, 3.12σ above baseline). Consistent with coolant/refrigerant leakage degrading cooling efficiency while PID compensates by increasing compressor demand.
